title: wilted indulgent polish garlicky meat paella
description: a hearty polish paella dish loaded with sautéed meats, onions, and spices, finished with a sweet glaze and a sprinkle of fresh parsley. this indulgent recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a satisfying weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: sweet or hot, whichever you prefer

instructions: heat the oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat. add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
remove the sausage from the pan and set aside. add the sliced onion to the pan and cook until caramelized, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.

add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly. add the chicken broth, white wine, tomato paste, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan. stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
add the browned sausage back to the pan and stir to combine. add the sliced chicken to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the sliced pork shoulder to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. stir in the honey and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the glaze has thickened slightly.
transfer the paella to the oven and bake at 375f for 25-30 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through and the liquid has been absorbed. garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
